changes.value:
Files: swissarmyhammer-lsp/src/lib.rs, swissarmyhammer-code-context/src/lib.rs

Both crate roots have module-level doc comments but no usage examples. Per Rust review guidelines: 'Crate-level docs include examples showing common use cases.'

For swissarmyhammer-lsp, a short example showing how to create an LspSupervisorManager and start it would help consumers. For swissarmyhammer-code-context, an example of CodeContextWorkspace::open() would be useful.
